scenarios.label: Normal run
scenarios.blurb: Three regimes draft, claims agree, the contradiction diff is green, every clock stops on release.

scenarios.label: Contradiction block
scenarios.blurb: One filing disagrees on the incident start time. The Warden's deterministic diff turns red and refuses signoff, then clears once the fact is corrected.

scenarios.label: Exactly-once under kill
scenarios.blurb: A drafter is killed after posting but before acking. On restart the dedup ledger drops the duplicate, so the filing lands exactly once.

scenarios.label: Amendment reconciliation (live capture)
scenarios.blurb: After release a load-bearing fact is revised. Two drafters reconcile through Band over hash-linked envelopes; the amended diff stays blocked until they concur.
